metadata.name: Manage Press Box on Game Day

description: A team's media relations coordinator needs to manage the press box during a game, providing stats and information to journalists.

nodes.task_description: Distribute game notes and starting lineups to all credentialed media before the game.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully provides all media with the necessary information.

nodes.task_description: During the game, provide real-time statistics and injury updates to the media.

expected_outcome.value: Agent continuously provides updates as they happen.

nodes.task_description: After the game, arrange and facilitate post-game interviews with players and coaches.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully coordinates the post-game press conferences.
